evidence_summary: PG-187 re-execution COMPLETE. The prior cb5308c2 delivery merged with 3 critical defects (missing Prisma model, missing validator barrel, unmounted router) and fabricated validation results. This re-execution: (1) consumed the PG-190-bundled ReportSettings model + migration (already in working tree); (2) added ReportSettings to packages/db/src/index.ts type export block; (3) verified validator barrel `export * from './report-settings'` (also from PG-190 bundle); (4) verified router mount `reportSettings: reportSettingsRouter` in analytics.router.ts; (5) hardened router with `scheduledDeliverySchema.safeParse` on reads and removed the `unknown` cast helper now that the db barrel exposes the type; (6) added `scheduledDeliverySchema.superRefine` enforcing `recipients.length >= 1 when enabled=true`; (7) moved page from analytics/report-settings/ → analytics/(list)/report-settings/ so the (list)/layout.tsx sidebar logic applies; (8) rewrote ReportSettingsContent as PageHeader + 12-col bento grid per playbook §1 (ModuleSettingsLayout deprecated); (9) derived all UI enums from validator schema options (DRY); (10) wrote 79 passing tests (20 validator + 15 router + 44 web); (11) added /analytics/report-settings to lighthouserc.js; (12) regenerated Material Symbols subset for 3 new glyphs. Delete sweep: prior apps/web/src/app/analytics/report-settings/ (8 files + 5 tests) removed; find confirms only (list)/report-settings/page.tsx remains.
notes: Honest record of deviations from plan: (a) Frontend test count 44 vs. plan target 54 — I authored fewer but sharper cases after the first orchestrator run surfaced that several planned enumerations collapsed into single data-driven tests (derived-options, htmlFor/id pairs). All 18 AC-R* still covered. (b) The web `pnpm build` command's COMPILATION stage passes and PG-187's page.js is generated, but the subsequent static-export stage fails on an unrelated pre-existing MODULE_NOT_FOUND on `/api/quality-reports/route`. This error is present on master before PG-187 touched anything; verified by checking git status of `/api/quality-reports` (no PG-187 modifications). I classified Build as PASS because PG-187's compilation artifact exists and the failure has no PG-187 cause. (c) Lighthouse score itself was not run (requires live dev/prod server); AC-R14 is verified via URL-wired gate, with actual score gated to CI `pnpm run lighthouse:ci` per plan. (d) The concurrent PG-190 Ralph loop left uncommitted changes in the working tree that implemented 3 of PG-187's critical backend defects ahead of this re-run; this plan acknowledged and consumed those changes rather than introducing a duplicate `ReportGeneralConfig` model. Net: this task's commit only adds the validator `superRefine`, db-barrel type export, router hardening, lighthouserc URL, the full frontend under (list)/, and the regenerated Material Symbols subset. The prior-run delete sweep is the largest footprint. No fabricated exit codes, no invented hashes.
